values.value: == CUSTOM FIELD XML FORMAT == IMPORTANT: Fields are EMBEDDED inside the CustomObject XML, not separate files. When adding fields to an existing object, the file must include the full CustomObject wrapper: File path: objects/ObjectName__c.object metadataType: CustomObject <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <CustomObject xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <label>Existing Object Label</label> <!-- MUST match existing label from org state --> <pluralLabel>Existing Plural Label</pluralLabel> <nameField> <label>Existing Name Field Label</label> <type>Text</type> </nameField> <deploymentStatus>Deployed</deploymentStatus> <sharingModel>ControlledByParent</sharingModel> <!-- fields go here --> <fields>...</fields> <fields>...</fields> </CustomObject>
Custom Field XML wrapper format inside CustomObject
